original_text:
### Brand Accent Shape (core container device)
- A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
- Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
- **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

relations.note: Uniform rounded corners on charts override the standard brand asymmetric opposite corner treatment.

quotes: A rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii; the other two corners keep a slight radius.
Approved radius pairs (print): 1.25" & 0.0625" (large containers/photos), 0.5" & 0.0625" (banners), 0.4375" & 0.0625" (small callout boxes).

Email px conversions (at 96dpi): large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email

rules.intent: Maintain brand visual cohesiveness using the signature asymmetric rounded-corner container design.
rules.rule_text: The core brand container accent device uses selectively enlarged opposite corner radii. In digital/email templates, apply the large radius (radius.general.large = 120px), banner radius (radius.general.banner = 48px), or callout radius (radius.general.callout = 42px) to one diagonal pair (default top-left & bottom-right), while the remaining corners use the small radius (radius.general.small = 6px). This diagonal orientation must remain consistent across all sections within a single asset.

quotes: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Maintain readability and clean structure for data-heavy sections.
rules.rule_text: Charts, infographics, and tables must use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (radius.infographic.panel = 12px) instead of the asymmetric brand accent shape.
